alice-marble-tennis-courts-outdoor.guidelines:
Welcome to the Alice Marble Tennis Courts! Perched high atop Russian hill with beautiful westward views of the Marina, the Golden Gate Bridge and the San Francisco Bay - there are few better views in the city. There are four dedicated tennis courts available for reservation. 

**Reservation Policy**
- Any individual may reserve a court, but may not book more than 1 court in a day or 3 courts in a calendar week.
- Reservation requests are for individual play only. No lessons, team practices, clinics or league matches.
- Please **[click here](https://sfrecpark.org/1188/Tennis-Pickleball-Reservations)** to view the full San Francisco Rec and Park reservation policy.

**Reservation Overview**

*Courts 1, 2, and 3*
- Courts 1, 2, and 3 are reservable for Tennis 7 days in advance.
- Reservations open at 8 AM. 
- All slots are 90 minutes, starting at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm and 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time). 

*Court 4*
- Court 4 is reservable for Tennis 2 days in advance. 
- Reservations open at 12 PM. 
- All slots at 60 minutes and start on the hour. 

**Location Features**
- 4 tennis courts
- 1 full-court basketball court
- Practice wall for tennis

balboa-park-outdoor.guidelines:

buena-vista-park-outdoor.guidelines:
Welcome to Buena Vista Park Tennis Courts! This site can be found on the Eastern side of the park, and features two lovely courts tucked away in the woods with a gorgeous view east towards downtown.

**Reservation Policy**
- Any individual may reserve a court, but may not book more than 1 court in a day or 3 courts in a calendar week.
- Reservation requests are for individual play only. No lessons, team practices, clinics or league matches.
- Courts left vacant 15 minutes after reservation time are available for walk-up play.
- Please **[click here](https://sfrecpark.org/1188/Tennis-Pickleball-Reservations)** to view the full San Francisco Rec and Park reservation policy.

**Reservation Overview:**

*Court 1*
- Court 1 is reservable for Tennis 7 days in advance.
- Reservations open at 8:00am.
- Reservations are 90 minutes and start at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm, 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time).
- Court 2 is available for walk-up Tennis on a first-come, first-serve basis.

*Courts A, B, C, D* 
- Courts A, B, C, and D are reservable for Pickleball 7 days in advance.
- Reservations open at 8:00am.
- Reservations are 90 minutes and start at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm, 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time). 

**Location Features**
- 2 tennis courts
- 4 pickleball courts. Players must provide their own nets.

angelo-j-rossi-playground-outdoor.guidelines:
Welcome to Rossi Park! At Arguello Boulevard and Edward Street, this is a lovely place to play tennis and pickleball. 

**Reservation Policy**
- Any individual may reserve a court, but may not book more than 1 court in a day or 3 courts in a calendar week.
- Reservation requests are for individual play only. No lessons, team practices, clinics or league matches.
- Courts left vacant 15 minutes after reservation time are available for walk-up play
- Please **[click here](https://sfrecpark.org/1188/Tennis-Pickleball-Reservations)** to view the full San Francisco Rec and Park reservation policy.

**Reservation Overview**

**Courts 1&2**
- Reservable slots are on WEEKENDS ONLY, 7:30am-1:30pm. All other times and days remain available for walk-up Tennis on a first-come, first-serve basis.
- Courts 1 and 2 are reservable for Tennis 7 days in advance.
-  Reservations open at 8:00am.
- Slots are 90 minutes and start at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am and 12:00pm.

**Court 3**
- Court 3 is reservable for Tennis 7 days in advance
- Reservations open at 8:00am
- Most slots are 90 minutes and start at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm, and 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time). 

**Courts A, B, C, D, and E**
- Courts A, B, C, D, and E are reservable for Pickleball 7 days in advance and up to 90 minute slots. 
- Reservations open at 8:00am 
- Most slots are 90 minutes and start at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm, and 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time). 

**Location Features**
- 3 tennis courts
- 5 pickleball courts. Four rolling nets are provided. Court E has a permanent net. 
- Bathroom access

**Reservation Policy**
- Any individual may reserve a court, but may not book more than 1 court in a day or 3 courts in a calendar week.
- Reservation requests are for individual play only. No lessons, team practices, clinics or league matches.
- Courts left vacant 15 minutes after reservation time are available for walk-up play
- Please **[click here](https://sfrecpark.org/1188/Tennis-Pickleball-Reservations)** to view the full San Francisco Rec and Park reservation policy.

**Reservation Overview**

*Court 1*
- Court 1 is reservable for Tennis 2 days in advance.
- Reservations open at noon. 
- All slots are 90 minutes, starting at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm and 1:30pm on weekdays and 1:30pm, 3:00pm, and 4:30pm on weekends (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time).

*Court A*
- Courts A is reservable for Pickleball 2 days in advance.
- Reservations open at noon. 
- All slots are 60 minutes, starting at 3:00pm, 4:00pm, and 5:00pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time) on weekdays and 10:30am, 11:30am, and 12:30pm on weekends 

*Courts B*
- Courts B is reservable for Pickleball 7 days in advance.
- Reservations open at 8:00am. 
- All slots are 60 minutes, starting at 3:00pm, 4:00pm, and 5:00pm on weekdays (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time) and 10:30am, 11:30am, and 12:30pm on weekends 

**Location Features**
- 1 tennis court
- 2 pickleball courts. Two rolling nets are provided.
- Bathroom access

sigmund-stern-recreation-grove-outdoor.guidelines:
You know and love it for its summer concert series, but Stern Grove has tennis and pickleball too! 

**Reservation Policy**
- Any individual may reserve a court, but may not book more than 1 court in a day or 3 courts in a calendar week.
- Reservation requests are for individual play only. No lessons, team practices, clinics or league matches.
- Courts left vacant 15 minutes after reservation time are available for walk-up play
- Please **[click here](https://sfrecpark.org/1188/Tennis-Pickleball-Reservations)** to view the full San Francisco Rec and Park reservation policy.

**Reservation Overview**

*Courts 1 and 2*
- Courts 1 and 2 are reservable for Tennis 7 days in advance.
- Reservations open at 8:00am. 
- All slots are 90 minutes, starting at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm and 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time).

- Courts A, C, D, and F are reservable for Pickleball 7 days in advance. 
- Reservations open at 8:00am. 
- All slots are 90 minutes, starting at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm and 4:30pm (6:00pm during Daylight Saving Time). 

**Location Features**
- 2 tennis courts
- 6 pickleball courts. There are 4 roll-on nets for use on courts A, C, D, and F
- Bathroom access - the nearest restrooms are at 20th Avenue & Wawona Street.

upper-noe-rec-center-outdoor.guidelines:
Come on out to Upper Noe, where pickleball and tennis are always welcome! There is one dedicated tennis court with space for two temporary pickleball courts. 

**Reservation Policy**
- Any individual may reserve a court, but may not book more than 1 court in a day or 3 courts in a calendar week.
- Reservation requests are for individual play only. No lessons, team practices, clinics or league matches.
- Courts left vacant 15 minutes after reservation time are available for walk-up play
- Please **[click here](https://sfrecpark.org/1188/Tennis-Pickleball-Reservations)** to view the full San Francisco Rec and Park reservation policy.

**Reservation Overview**

*Court 1*
- Court 1 is reservable for Tennis 2 days in advance.
- Reservations open at noon. 
- All slots are 90 minutes, starting at 7:30am, 9:00am, 10:30am, 12:00pm, 1:30pm, 3:00pm, 4:30pm, 6:00pm, and 7:30pm. 

*Courts A and B*
- Courts A and B are reservable for Pickleball 2 days in advance. 
- Reservations open at noon.
- All slots are 90 minutes, starting at 10:30am and 12:00pm.

**Location Features**
- 1 tennis court
- 2 pickleball courts. Pickleball net, paddles and balls available to borrow Tuesday-Friday, 10am-7pm and Saturday 9am-4pm.
- Lights
- Bathroom access
